steps.t: Arâniz believes you will need the escaped thralls' help to get into Esh Mêkag. You should talk to Ishûri and mention the name 'Ebuzâm'.
Ishûri has agreed to show you the secret way into Esh Mêkag. You should talk to Ishûri when you are ready to enter Esh Mêkag.
You have entered Esh Mêkag via the escapees' secret route. You should talk to Ishûri in Esh Mêkag. If you need to re-enter Esh Mêkag, talk to Ishûri i…
You should find Ebuzâm somewhere in the Esh Mêkag pit-mine. If you need to re-enter Esh Mêkag, talk to Ishûri in Dur Nâgu.
You must help some prisoners escape Esh Mêkag before Ebuzâm will leave. You should rescue Ebuzâm's children, Enûtu and Shakûl, as well as the Aradûni …
You have rescued who you can. You should return to Dur Nâgu using the secret tunnel.
You have successfully rescued many prisoners from Esh Mêkag. You should report your success to Arâniz in Dur Nâgu.
